title: Kitten Prompt Experiment — Raw Run
description: JSON Schema for a single raw API response file under data/<model>/<variant>/run-XX.json. Covers run metadata and the unedited model response. Coding annotations are produced separately according to GLOSSARY.md and CODING_INSTRUCTIONS.md and stored under codings/.

model.description: Model identifier (e.g., 'gpt-5.5-2026-04-23'). Free-form to allow easy extension.

prompt_variant.description: Which prompt variant was sent. See README.md for the full text of each variant.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the prompt was submitted.

interface.description: Always 'api'. The experiment is API-only by design, to isolate model-layer behavior from consumer-UI system prompts.

request_params.description: Exact request parameters sent (model id, system prompt presence, temperature, etc.). Captured for reproducibility.

usage.description: Token usage as reported by the provider.
